name_en: Code: 665716 Medium Map 🏆[MCM] Classic Style: Double Row Studs on Sides Made from our iconic Visetos coated canvas. Features a luxurious sheepskin lining 🐑. Includes a tablet💻 pocket inside. YKK zipper. Copper plate with independent code 🔢 Non-repeating
